description_long: This object is a vintage typewriter with a rectangular body and a slightly sloped top surface. The front features a full set of raised, circular keys arranged in a single row, with a space bar at the bottom. The sides display large, round knobs, likely for advancing paper, and the rear is dominated by a flat, vertical panel that would support a sheet of paper. The object stands on four short, cylindrical feet, elevating it slightly above the surface. The overall design is utilitarian, with minimal decorative elements and a uniform, light-colored finish. The construction appears to be primarily metal, with some plastic or rubber components for the keys and feet.
description: A vintage typewriter with a rectangular body, raised circular keys, and large side knobs, finished in a uniform light color.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full set of raised keys and the space bar.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the large round knob and sloped top surface.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the flat vertical panel and two rear feet.
description_view_3: Right side view with a matching round knob and visible key arrangement.
